cards.back: A component that specifies the actions that can be performed on it, defined in the AndroidManifest.xml file
The sequence of events that an activity goes through, such as onCreate, onStart, and onDestroy
The sequence of events that a broadcast message goes through, such as sending and receiving, and handling broadcasts
An intent that requests an action without specifying the component that should handle the action
An intent that requests an action and specifies the component that should handle the action
